instanceIdentifier O0..*IdentifierIdentifier of the device instance

ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populateProducer

ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populateProducer
modelNumber O0..1stringThe manufacturer's model number for the device
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populateProducer
version O0..*stringThe actual design of the device and/or software version running on the device
ObligationsActor
SHOULD:able-to-populateProducer
note O0..1stringDevice note and/or comment
ObligationsActor
SHALL:able-to-populateProducer
SHALL:displayConsumer

name: EHDSDeviceLaboratoryObligations
title: Device laboratory specific obligations
description: Obligations for the logical model of device in the scope of laboratory use case

extension.valueMarkdown: Consumer system SHALL consider the value to assees comparability of the result values if device is the author of the observation.

element.short: Name of device manufacturer. If the manufacturer code is included in an identifier, manufacturer must correspond to that code.
element.definition: Name of device manufacturer. If the manufacturer code is included in an identifier, manufacturer must correspond to that code.

element.short: The date and time when the device was manufactured
element.definition: The date and time when the device was manufactured

element.short: The date and time beyond which this device is no longer valid or should not be used (if applicable)
element.definition: The date and time beyond which this device is no longer valid or should not be used (if applicable)

element.short: Lot number of device. May be omitted if included in an identifier.
element.definition: Lot number of device. May be omitted if included in an identifier.

element.short: Serial number assigned by the manufacturer. May be omitted if included in an identifier.
element.definition: Serial number assigned by the manufacturer. May be omitted if included in an identifier.

element.definition: The name and name type of the device.

element.definition: The name of the device as known to e.g. the manufacturer and/or patient
